app.title: OpenViking Console
addResource.title: Add Resource
addResource.description: Upload a local file to the server. File type is auto-detected via magic bytes.
addResource.dropzone.title: Drag & drop a file here, or click to select
addResource.dropzone.hint: Supports any file type. Only one file at a time.
addResource.fileInfo.name: File
addResource.parentUri.hint: Leave as viking://resources/ unless you need a different parent.
addResource.latestResult.title: Latest Result
addResource.latestResult.description: Latest raw response from temp upload and add resource requests.
addResource.dirPicker.title: Select Directory
addResource.remoteUrl.hint: HTTP(S) URL, Git repository, or other remote resource address.
addResource.dropzone.supportedFormats: Supports PDF, Word, PPT, Excel, Markdown, code files, images, and more
addResource.directlyUploadMedia.hint: When enabled, media files (images, audio, video) are stored as-is. When disabled, media files are processed through AI vision/audio pipeline for content extraction first.
addResource.reason.placeholder: Why are you adding this resource?
addResource.instruction.placeholder: Special processing instructions for this resource.
